name: @jeswr/matrix-chat-to-pod
description: Ingest Matrix room history into a Solid pod (owner-private, READ/import-only). The highest chat-capture multiplier: one schema reaches WhatsApp/Signal/Telegram/Slack/Discord/iMessage via mautrix bridges/Beeper. A pure, fixture-tested transform maps a Matrix m.room.message event to a @jeswr/solid-chat-interop CanonicalMessage (edits via m.replace -> dct:isReplacedBy, redactions -> schema:dateDeleted, replies via m.in_reply_to), then writes each as a SolidOS LongChat resource readable by PM /chat and any LongChat reader. Homeserver fetches are SSRF-guarded via @jeswr/guarded-fetch; the pod-write fetch is injectable.
author: Jesse Wright

scripts.lint: biome check src test scripts && npm run check:lockfile-transport
scripts.gate: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build && npm run check:dist
